title: Global Territorial Buffer Engine
description: Production pipeline generating seamless, non-overlapping offshore territorial zones for ~200 sovereign territories. Replaced O(N²) vector polygon intersection with O(N) Euclidean Distance Transform for conflict resolution. Zero-crash 8-hour run on Databricks via shared-memory parallelism and disk-based checkpointing.

title: Batch Geospatial API Enrichment Application
description: Desktop GUI application (.exe) for batch-processing insurance portfolios through 4 internal APIs. Refactored from geocoding-only to full pipeline: geocoding, location info, risk zone enrichment, rate computation. Threaded concurrency, cooperative cancellation, dynamic SSL handling, PyInstaller packaging.

title: Cross-Lingual Municipality Enrichment: SFD/MFD Classification
description: Waterfall entity resolution pipeline linking Eurostat census dwelling data to GfK administrative boundaries across 9 European countries. Solved cross-lingual name matching (Greek transliteration, bilingual splits, spatial composite keys) — achieving 95–100% match rates per country.

title: US Coastal Proximity Analysis & ArcGIS Pro Toolbox
description: Novel 'Magnet Method' deriving a high-resolution coastal boundary directly from postal code geometries — avoiding km-level systematic errors from reference coastlines. Identifies postal codes within 25 miles of the US Atlantic and Gulf coastline. Packaged as a reusable ArcGIS Pro Python Toolbox (.pyt).

title: India Building Data Validation: OSM Quality Assessment
description: National-scale pipeline assessing accuracy of OpenStreetMap building:levels data for India. Acquisition via Overpass API (regional partitioning), urbanisation stratification with JRC GHS-SMOD, and Google Street View ground-truth validation. Outcomes inform whether crowdsourced data is viable for insurance exposure modelling.

title: Improvement of Areal Precipitation for Rainfall-Runoff Modeling using Modified Topographic Information
description: Developed a novel directional DEM smoothing and stratified kriging framework, reducing precipitation estimation errors by 45.4%. Quantified impact on a calibrated HBV model for flood forecasting.

title: Flood Risk Reduction - Roßhaupten
description: Micro-level flood risk assessment for the Rosshaupten Municipality. Utilized high-resolution geospatial parameters to model hydrological response and design culvert/retention mitigation strategies.

title: Glacier Dynamics Analysis - Nepal
description: Investigated long-term glacier dynamics (1990-2020) in the Marshyangdi river basin. Applied Machine Learning to multi-temporal Landsat and Sentinel-2 imagery for ice differentiation.

title: Snowmelt Runoff Modeling
description: Integrated satellite-derived radiation data into a physically-based snowmelt runoff model for the Inn River Basin, Bavaria. Enhanced model accuracy for efficient water management.

title: Post-Disaster LULC Detection
description: Quantified Land Use/Land Cover change patterns in Panauti and Banepa Valley following the 2015 Nepal earthquake using Change Detection techniques and ground validation.
